## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated; new tests cover the change
- [ ] `bun run test && bun run lint && bun run typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Public API surface snapshot updated if API changed
- [ ] Commit(s) are GPG/SSH-signed
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commit format (e.g. `feat(codec): ...`, `fix(zod): ...`)
